nodes.label: GA Fixed Genes And Budget Design
nodes.summary: Design adding fixed numeric genes as full-genome members plus exact GA evaluation-budget control and run diagnostics.

nodes.label: Fixed numeric genes
nodes.summary: GeneDef accepts equal numeric bounds so a fixed value remains part of Individual.genes, params, callbacks, logbooks, and dataframes while operators preserve it.

edges.rationale: The design allows equal numeric bounds and requires operators to preserve fixed values.
Fixed numeric genes are expressed as GeneDef/GeneSpace metadata.
